creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #4)
Thanks for testing so quickly.

If I look at the official package builders all i386 builds end up in some memory exhaustion.
BTW, I don't see the error in comment #1 about "libthr.so" recurring.


I'm afraid the only "solution" is to mark this port as BROKEN_i386="not enough memory on this architecture to build the port"

Unless somebody else has a better solution.
